stimulus:
Welcome!

In this study, you will play three short video games that were generated by Artificial Intelligence (AI) and complete a short survey after each game.

Please make sure you are in a quiet environment where you can focus for the duration of the study. Some games may use sound, so please ensure that your device's volume is not muted.

Press any key to begin.
Press any key to proceed to the first video game. Should you encounter a game-breaking bug, please report the issue in the Menu tab to the right of the screen.

response: {"creativity-rating":2,"creativity-free-response":"The concept felt creative but the mechanics were very generic, the gameplay loop has been done before, but the overall idea felt relatively unique.","originality-rating":3,"originality-free-response":"The pixelated art style combined with the idea of a moth and a flame felt original. The mechanics were unoriginal but the idea was solid.","effectiveness-rating":2,"effectiveness-free-response":"The game was very simple with minimal interactivity, there was no real challenge experienced. It was frustrating getting caught in the light at one point, and the moth was not rotating, but rather bumping into the light over and over again.","authenticity-rating":2,"attention-check":3,"intentionality-rating":2,"authenticity-intentionality-free-response":"I've seen similar gameplay mechanics in various mobile and flash games growing up. If the game was created by AI then I don't see the developer having put in much \"personal\" effort."}
